name: Wholesome Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler or in a small heavy saucepan over very low heat, melt the chocolate chips and butter. Remove from heat and stir until smooth. Set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, combine oats, wheat germ, dry milk, baking powder, salt (if desired), and nuts. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs and mix in brown and white sugars and vanilla until thick. Stir in melted chocolate mixture. Fold in the oat mixture until just blended.
4. Pour batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until top is crisp but a toothpick inserted in center comes out slightly moist. Set aside to cool completely before cutting into strips.
